name: Cyanobacteria
description: The original photosynthetic intelligence — 3.5 billion years of solar energy conversion that oxygenated Earth's atmosphere. Nitrogen fixation in heterocysts creates specialized cellular division of labor. Circadian clock proteins (KaiABC) form the simplest known biological oscillator, maintaining 24-hour rhythm without transcription.

core_attributes.pattern: photosynthetic origin, nitrogen fixation, circadian protein oscillation
